name: State Homeland Security Program
description: Supports the implementation of state homeland security strategies to address planning, equipment, training, and exercise needs.

name: Urban Areas Security Initiative
description: Addresses the unique multi-discipline planning, operations, equipment, training, and exercise needs of high-threat, high-density Urban Areas.

name: Emergency Management Performance Grant
description: Provides state and local emergency management agencies with funds to sustain and enhance all-hazards emergency management capabilities.

name: State and Local Cybersecurity Grant Program
description: Provides funding to address cybersecurity risks and threats to information systems owned or operated by state, local, tribal, and territorial governments.

name: Nonprofit Security Grant Program
description: Provides funding support for target hardening and other physical security enhancements and activities to nonprofit organizations at high risk of terrorist attack.
